headline: Visier Designated Highest Leader in Everest Group's PEAK Matrix® for People Analytics Platforms for Third Year in a Row
summary: Visier, the global leader in Workforce Intelligence with its Visier Workforce AI platform, has been named the highest Leader in Everest Group's People Analytics Platforms PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026. This marks Visier being designated highest Leader for the third year in a row, dating back to the report's inception in 2024.

headline: Everest Group: Q1 Points To Steady Improvement
summary: Everest Group is executing a turnaround, refocusing on reinsurance and divesting underperforming insurance lines. See why EG stock is a Buy.
